notes:
Fixes the zoom data-loss bug (PRD Addendum 20 §T3).

**Fixes & polish**

- **Zoom: your edits are no longer lost.** Zooming into a block from the Journal
  via its gutter marker was saving your changes into the wrong note, so they
  vanished on zoom-out. The marker now targets the block's own note, so edits in
  a focused view persist correctly.

**Under the hood**

- Keeps the temporary, local-only zoom diagnostics for one more build to confirm
  the fix in the wild; they'll be removed next.
